joint.selection_formula: efficiency_score = prediction_score / max(mean_trial_v1_q_active_fC / 1e7, 1e-9); SOM family prediction_score = SOM one-hot future-orientation cosine * log1p(predicted SOM-channel count); joint family prediction_score = that SOM component plus V1_E one-hot future-orientation cosine * log1p(predicted V1_E-channel count). Eligibility requires nonzero prediction_score, V1_E population rate <= 100 Hz, V1_SOM population rate <= 50 Hz, and mean V1_E trailer count >= 5. Tie-break lower g_total.

som.selection_formula: efficiency_score = prediction_score / max(mean_trial_v1_q_active_fC / 1e7, 1e-9); SOM family prediction_score = SOM one-hot future-orientation cosine * log1p(predicted SOM-channel count); joint family prediction_score = that SOM component plus V1_E one-hot future-orientation cosine * log1p(predicted V1_E-channel count). Eligibility requires nonzero prediction_score, V1_E population rate <= 100 Hz, V1_SOM population rate <= 50 Hz, and mean V1_E trailer count >= 5. Tie-break lower g_total.
